LAW AND MOTION 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS ANNIE CHEN AND DEAN CHEN'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED BUT ARBITRATION IS ORDERED DELAYED UNTIL THE CONCLUSION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS PROCEEDINGS BETWEEN THE PARTIES PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1281.2(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-06-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steve Hammond of Hammond Law, 595-7815, appearing for petitioners and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS ANNIE CHEN AND DEAN CHEN'S Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration IS GRANTED BUT ARBITRATION IS ORDERED DELAYED UNTIL THE CONCLUSION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS PROCEEDINGS BETWEEN THE PARTIES PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1281.2(C). Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/XDS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
